---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ADITYA-ROUTH
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

> A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🧩 Problem It Solves

> What problem does this feature address? What is the motivation?
> e.g. "I find it annoying when..." or "It would help developers who..."

## 💡 Proposed Solution

> Describe how you envision this feature working. Be as specific as possible.

## 🎨 Design / UI Mockups

> If the feature involves a visual change, add mockups, sketches, or references here.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

> Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why is your proposed approach better?

## 🏋️ Implementation Scope

> How difficult do you think this is to implement?

- [ ] Small (minor UI change, typo fix)
- [ ] Medium (new component, new animation)
- [ ] Large (new section, new API, architectural change)

## 📝 Additional Context

> Any other context, links to similar implementations, or references that would help.
